description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a well-maintained green lawn and enclosed by a perimeter fence. The structure features a flat roof, large windows, and multiple outdoor living spaces, including a patio with seating and a pool area. The building is predominantly white with wooden accents, and the landscaping includes several trees and shrubs for privacy and aesthetic appeal. The main entrance is set behind a gate, and the layout is open, with visible interior divisions for rooms. The backyard area is designed for relaxation, with lounge chairs and a deck adjacent to the pool. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped outdoor areas including a pool and patio, all enclosed by a fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, patio area, and landscaped garden with trees and outdoor seating.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long row of large windows and the open lawn area along the length of the bungalow.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the gated entrance, backyard lawn, and the back facade of the bungalow.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring the pool, deck, and additional outdoor seating, with clear visibility of the flat roof and garden.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows along the sides
